_meta.voice: Direct American English. Replaces every single-word placeholder alt (`hero`/`card`/`mobile`/`Mobile`/`calculator`/`desktop`) with a real per-image description in both UK and EN. Hero copy / body / sections are already translated upstream.
_meta.notes: Doc was half-translated: body and hero text already had EN. This file (a) fills the CTA label gap (Переглянути сайт → Visit site) and (b) overrides every image-alt slot with brand-aware copy in both locales.
